meta.title: ~/emilynguyen
meta.description: Emily Nguyen - Software Engineer specializing in developer tooling, CI/CD, and AI-integrated workflows

profile.name: Emily Nguyen
profile.bio: swe @ meta | uc berkeley cs. builds autonomous AI agents that ship code overnight. party games for game night. tools for friends.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: CI/CD infrastructure and test automation for wearable devices — built the device lab from scratch, 30+ devices across 2 racks. Defined the release quality framework that surfaced 72 bugs pre-release. Built AI developer tooling: LLM IDE plugins for automated task setup, and an agent pipeline that writes team docs from code changes. Led a 3-engineer testing team. Won an engineering award for pioneering release testing.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Shipped the Dolby Atmos Plugin for Unreal Engine in collaboration with Epic Games. First test-focused engineer on the team — designed the QA framework, automated 300+ integration tests, and sped up CI pipelines by 33%. Built Python interfaces for a real-time audio C++/C SDK.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Built a QuickPay payment system: transaction links on demand, real-time transaction views, Stripe API backend. Designed and built the customer-facing UI in CSS/HTML with Django.

experience.title: Code Coach
experience.description: Taught programming to students ages 7–16 in one-on-one sessions. Led nine week-long camps with 12–14 students each — every camper shipped something by the end.

experience.title: XR/VR Course Facilitator
experience.description: Facilitated a VR development course for UC Berkeley students — Unity, C#, hands-on labs, and a final project.

projects.name: AI Agent Orchestrator
projects.description: the system that manages my kanban board and ships code overnight. dispatches AI workers across projects, reviews its own PRs, and sends me a report in the morning.

projects.name: Pixietown
projects.description: Multi-agent orchestration visualizer with real-time state management. Python bridge polls task state files and broadcasts agent activity over WebSocket to a pixel-art frontend rendering live orchestration status.

projects.name: Dolby Atmos for Unreal
projects.description: Cross-platform real-time audio processing SDK plugin for Unreal Engine, released in collaboration with Epic Games.

projects.name: ArkAngel
projects.description: 2D top-down adventure RPG with dialogue branching, player movement, and minigames.

projects.name: VR Escape Room
projects.description: Interactive VR escape room with minigames, built for Oculus.
